author: Maria Chen (CEO)
text: We just completed the full rollout of Project Helios to every customer segment — our biggest product launch this year! Huge thanks to everyone who made this happen.

author: Priya Nair (Head of People)
text: We're thrilled to welcome 45 new teammates who joined us across our SF, Austin, and Berlin offices this month!

author: David Kim (VP Engineering)
text: The recording from this week's Q3 All-Hands is now posted — thank you all for the great questions!

author: Sofia Reyes (Head of Product)
text: We launched Acme Copilot, our new AI-powered assistant, to 100% of Enterprise customers this week!

author: Owen Brooks (CFO)
text: We closed our Series D funding round this week — $120M to accelerate growth across product and go-to-market. Thank you to every team that got us here.

author: Sam Diaz
text: Fixed the Redis connection leak that was causing latency spikes in the checkout cache layer.

author: Jordan Lee
text: Closed the Meridian Health deal — biggest ACV of the quarter for our team!

author: Anonymous Squirrel
text: Who else's dog joined their standup this morning lol
